descriptionHtml:
Custom Gulet for sale 1981 | 4 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

 

If you are seeking a spacious and reliable vessel for cruising or charter activities, the Custom Gulet for sale 1981 presents a noteworthy opportunity. This Custom Gulet for sale 1981, built in 1981, has been maintained in good condition and offers a versatile layout along with robust equipment, providing comfort for longer stays aboard as well as day trips.

Specifications

  • Type: Custom Gullet
  • Year: 1981
  • Length: 22.50 m
  • Beam: 5.80 m
  • Draft: 2.80 m
  • Hull Colour: White
  • Hull Material: Wood
  • Keel Material: Steel
  • Deck Finish: Teak (side decks, cockpit, and superstructure)
  • Cockpit Cushions: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes

Accommodation and Facilities

  • Cabins:
    • 1 crew cabin with two single beds, WC, and shower
    • 1 cabin with king-size double bed and single bed, en suite WC and shower
    • 1 cabin with double bed, en suite WC and shower
    • 2 twin cabins with two single beds and a bunk each, en suite WC and shower
  • Bathrooms: 4
  • Shower Boxes: 2
  • Interior Wood: Mahogany

Galley and Comfort

  • Cooking: Induction stove with hood, ventilated oven, microwave, and external kitchen with 2 BBQs, 2 fryers, and coffee machine
  • Refrigeration: 4 refrigerators
  • Entertainment: 50" television, two 32" televisions, Dolby sound system

Mechanical and Technical

  • Engines: 2 x Caterpillar, 320 hp each
  • Engine Hours: 4,500
  • Type: Inboard
  • Transmission: Shaft drive
  • Bow Thruster: 48V

Navigation and Electronics

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF: Yes
  • Echo Sounder (ECO): Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Tridata: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Radar: Yes
  • Wind Instrument: Yes
  • Stereo: Yes

Electrical and Water Systems

  • Voltage: 12/24/220V
  • Total Batteries: 24 (2500 Ah in total)
  • Water Tank: 1 (3500 L capacity)
  • Bilge Pumps: 9
  • Heating: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Water Boiler: Yes
  • Pressurised water pumps (autoclaves): 3
  • Black Water System: Yes
  • External Shower: Yes
  • Generator: 20 kW
  • Inverters: 2 x 6 kW

Rigging and Sail Equipment

  • Mast Material: Wood
  • Bowsprit: Yes
  • Furling Headsail: Yes

Safety and Mooring

  • Anchor Winch: Yes
  • Anchors: 2 (each 80 kg)
  • Anchor Chains: 100 m
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Liferaft: Yes

This Custom Gulet for sale 1981, combines classic maritime style and practical equipment with a focus on comfort and reliability. With robust engines, comprehensive navigation electronics, and safety systems, the vessel remains equipped for secure and enjoyable journeys. Viewing available, contact us today.
